_publications._publicationTitle: Merlin is a potent inhibitor of glioma growth.

_contextSnippet: β-catenin transcriptional activity is inhibited by wild-type merlin and merlinS518A, but not by merlinS518D
details: β-catenin transcriptional activity was inhibited by wild-type merlin and merlinS518A, but not by merlinS518D in reporter assays
